  - CodeGen/TestSuite:: for [[p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy]] <roam uid="hH38FJnvO"/>
    - ### [[TestType/Mobile]] <roam uid="0A-13HYtz"/>
      - Test::  <roam uid="5gmYSjDHk"/>
    - ### [[TestType/Web]] <roam uid="0k60cinWU"/>
      - Admin Portal <roam uid="7vNRJGKIk"/>
        - Login <roam uid="b_bCLjb71"/>
          - Screen 1 <roam uid="T6IPO0asy"/>
            - UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FlNSq9NGbcU.png?alt=media&token=61fa19f5-1245-4c36-aa6d-42cf366d4090) <roam uid="lgPhxOUEn"/>
            - Test Cases <roam uid="QozGq-Yhw"/>
              - When I enter a valid email address in the email field, it must be accepted. #Manual <roam uid="iXsNX118g"/>
              - When I enter an invalid email format in the email field, an error message must be displayed. #Manual <roam uid="y_G87XxKn"/>
              - When I enter a valid password in the password field, it must be accepted. #Manual <roam uid="FL9kNrNTG"/>
              - When I enter an invalid password (e.g., less than 8 characters, or missing required elements), it must be rejected. #Manual <roam uid="Sff6V9xcG"/>
            - Screen 2 <roam uid="oe2Q9_Obh"/>
              - UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FWMClVmRz-E.png?alt=media&token=a50fd2a7-a039-4237-a3a4-232a7258d5f6)\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FY-ISFcKHUh.png?alt=media&token=7a35a751-1003-4ab9-9ace-e58b0af90678) <roam uid="-tYXtzBl5"/>
              - Test cases <roam uid="cGEkPBIGI"/>
                - When I use the "Forgot Password" flow with a valid OTP, the system must allow me to reset the password. #Manual <roam uid="mcgynluqf"/>
                - When I enter an invalid OTP during the "Forgot Password" process, the system must show an error message such as "Invalid OTP. Please try again" and I must not be redirected to the password reset page. #Manual <roam uid="MVLmMHMab"/>
                - When I enter an OTP after the 5-minute timer has expired, the system must show an error message such as "OTP has expired. Please request a new one" and I must not be redirected to the password reset page. #Manual <roam uid="1wQIhRKOE"/>
                - When I enter a blank OTP, the system must show an error message such as "OTP is required". #Manual <roam uid="tQXf5Eajr"/>
                - When I click on "Resend OTP" after the 2-minute timer or original one expires or becomes invalid, the system must send a new OTP to the registered email address and the new OTP must allow me to proceed to the password reset page. #Manual <roam uid="1aNhnkzj4"/>
                - When I enter multiple invalid OTPs consecutively, after a predefined number of attempts the system must display an error such as "Too many invalid attempts. Please request a new OTP" and I must be prompted to click "Resend OTP" or restart the process. #Manual <roam uid="M7r7vKrUn"/>
                - When I request an OTP using an unregistered email address, the system must show an error message and no OTP must be sent. #Manual <roam uid="WBOm8hd-W"/>
            - Screen 3 <roam uid="EgyJbKsnC"/>
              - UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2Fxs4IbGnkPB.png?alt=media&token=ac86990b-0331-4e29-b460-8698deae7a09) <roam uid="Nvoe-ewnQ"/>
              - Test cases <roam uid="JdUhDbkmt"/>
                - When I enter a valid OTP received on the registered email and click **Submit**, I must be successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard. #Manual <roam uid="HodfhkeO2"/>
                - When I enter an invalid OTP and click **Submit**, the system must show an error such as *"Invalid OTP"* and I must not be logged in. #Manual <roam uid="sLZOM3xKT"/>
                - When I leave the OTP fields blank and click **Submit**, the system must show a validation error such as *"OTP is required"*. #Manual <roam uid="lmzfc9o4n"/>
                - When I enter a valid OTP after the timer ( 5 minutes) has expired, the system must reject it and display an error such as *"OTP expired. Please request a new one"*. #Manual <roam uid="6Ce9mjkkz"/>
                - When I click **Resend OTP**, a new OTP must be sent to my registered email and only the latest OTP must be valid. #Manual <roam uid="1vlWAhn3P"/>
                - When I try to log in without OTP verification (e.g., by refreshing or going back in the browser), the system must prevent access and redirect me to the OTP page. #Manual <roam uid="d-fxPSFch"/>
        - Dashboard <roam uid="ll6WDzPHS"/>
          - Dashboard Analytics <roam uid="7cxs6M8yB"/>
            - 90 Days Report <roam uid="ACJdgeAnv" refs="1"/>
              - Screen1: <roam uid="Y5RMLwxVS" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FmPcy6nS54N.png?alt=media&token=8c546edf-c383-44e2-8495-202231f5c9b5) <roam uid="qYAQTsCTe" refs="1"/>
                2. Test Cases <roam uid="BFyOPIqAm" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i click on 90 day report card of Main page of dashboard analytics , i get redirected to 90 day report page.#Manual <roam uid="MIk-Jkw1E" refs="1"/>
                  2. When i see 90 day report page i should see “cases without MD evaluation”, ‘within 15 days” , “Within 45 days’ cards , and MR list.#Manual <roam uid="LgCTHfOMe" refs="1"/>
                  3. When i see list , the list must be all the active cases list present in the system , whose case physician details are not present , that is if i choose “is there case physician” as no while creating a medical record then all those cases must be shown here.#Manual <roam uid="5fsj2CKya" refs="1"/>
                  4. When i see Total cases Card i must see all open cases count without MD Evaluation (i.e , cases count which has “is there case physician” as no).#Manual <roam uid="T_HF6eOeR" refs="1"/>
                  5. Total cases card must be equal to list shown.#Manual <roam uid="RyC34Zclp" refs="1"/>
                  6. When i see with in 15 days card then i must see all open cases count without MD Evaluation , based on MD referral days(90,120,150,180) which we set from admin module system settings, this within 15 days card will show the count of cases which is falling under last 15 days time period.#Manual <roam uid="R6IgKFVlN" refs="1"/>
                  7. When i see within 45 days card then i must see all open cases count without MD Evaluation , based on MD referral days(90,120,150,180) which we set from admin module system settings, this within 45 days card will show the count of cases which is falling under last 45 days time period.#Manual <roam uid="s-0cxaqa9" refs="1"/>
                  8. When i set 90 days as limit from system settings , and if i see 45 cases in with in 15 days and 10 cases in with in 45 days cards , then if i got to system settings and i change the limit to 120 , then the count of cases on the cards must also be changed respectively .#Manual <roam uid="DZ9RPn9db" refs="1"/>
                  9. If the cases are with in 15 days limit without MD evaluation then it must be shown with Red flag symbol as shown in design , and for 45 days it must be shown with yellow color symbol on the card and in the list.#Manual <roam uid="rtU7uR1SM" refs="1"/>
                  10. If within 45 days cases reach to 15 days , then they must be excluded from within 45 days cases count and must be shown in 15 days cases count.#Manual <roam uid="o8WWJ9MOk" refs="1"/>
                  11. When i click on filters Button “Report filters”  side drawer must be opened and only Facility and Provider filters must be shown, with “Reset Defaults” and “Apply Filters”.#Manual <roam uid="yN3bfTZLr" refs="1"/>
                  12. “Reset Defaults” and “Apply Filters” must be only visible once we select any of the filter.#Manual <roam uid="39m2VAe_s" refs="1"/>
                  13. When we click on Facility field the drop down consists of all the  facilities must be shown.#Manual <roam uid="dADM0lbEt" refs="1"/>
                  14. When we click on Provider field the drop down consists of all the Providers must be shown.#Manual <roam uid="XbV-qo9Zp" refs="1"/>
                  15. When i select only facility filter then Apply Filters button must be enabled and when i click on “Apply Filters” button then the cards and list must be filtered based on even if an single appointment is booked under that facility which is used in that particular case.#Manual <roam uid="EgYWaQusL" refs="1"/>
                  16. When i select only provider filter then Apply Filters button must be enabled and when i click on “Apply Filters” button then the cards and list must be filtered based on even if an single appointment is booked with that provider which is used in that particular case.#Manual <roam uid="5zbOHAohr" refs="1"/>
                  17. When i select both provider and facility filters then Apply Filters button must be enabled and when i click on “Apply Filters” button then the cards and list must be filtered based on even if an single appointment is booked in that selected facility with that provider which is used in that particular case.#Manual <roam uid="2wqrSUWCV" refs="1"/>
                  18. When i click on “Reset Defaults” all the filters must be removed and data must be reset to default.#Manual <roam uid="mGx9EWydS" refs="1"/>
                  19. Even when i apply filters “Cases without MD evaluation” card count and list count must be same.#Manual <roam uid="yjQFJeD66" refs="1"/>
                  20. When There are no filters applied , then “Applied Filter(s)” must be shown as N/A.#Manual <roam uid="GP07Idn_S" refs="1"/>
                  21. When Filters are applied Then the applied filters must be shown beside ‘**Applied Filter(s)**’.#Manual <roam uid="EjWMzale1" refs="1"/>
                  22. When i search client ID or client name then , the list must be filtered accordingly , as per searched client id or client name.#Manual <roam uid="ev2l1BTW2" refs="1"/>
                  23. When i click on cross icon after searching name then the list must be reset to default.#Manual <roam uid="OJDGMxa2R" refs="1"/>
                  24. When i click on sort icon of client name, then the list must be sorted ascending and descending alphabetical order as per client last name.#Manual <roam uid="MnOwGHhCM" refs="1"/>
                  25. When i click on sort icon of “Date of Onset”, then the list must be sorted ascending and descending as per onset date.#Manual <roam uid="uZuYmZV8w" refs="1"/>
                  26. When i click on sort icon of Provider name, then the list must be sorted ascending and descending alphabetical order as per provider last name and provider name must be shown as per design.#Manual <roam uid="uG9cXBRDL" refs="1"/>
                  27. When i see “Days to Referral” column in list i should see the count of days without MD evaluation for each case , everyday decreasing the count.#Manual <roam uid="fLM3LgPrM" refs="1"/>
                  28. When “Days to Referral” is completed then “Overdue” must be shown in red color and the complete row must be shown in red color with a warning icon on left side of client id.#Manual <roam uid="F3Sjh-Vel" refs="1"/>
                  29. When i click on “Days to Referral” sort then the list should get sorted in ascending and descending order as per count and if sort is applied for ascending order then overdue cases must be shown in list.#Manual <roam uid="Q3XHgzUo4" refs="1"/>
                  30. When i click on view details of any case then i should get redirected to that particular client’s MR of chart notes.#Manual <roam uid="PzvbWZTm7" refs="1"/>
                  31. When there is no data then 0 must be shown on cards.#Manual <roam uid="69e3f3aov" refs="1"/>
                  32. When there are no entries in the list then “No reports available.” message must be shown.#Manual <roam uid="t1cNgXOMN" refs="1"/>
                  33. When there are no entries in the list for entered client name or client id then “No report found for the entered text.” message must be shown.#Manual <roam uid="1PQgyI_nw" refs="1"/>
                  34. When we Hover on the Flag icons on the right side of client name , then tool tip must be shown with the data as per design which consists of data in how many days does it will reach its deadline.#Manual <roam uid="VPVzyuaKV" refs="1"/>
                  35. When i click on exclamation icon then it must show the tooltip as per given info in design.#Manual <roam uid="nOStsNtvA" refs="1"/>
                3. Test Cases <roam uid="UOLl3EK0l"/>
                  - **Test:** When I click on 90 day report card on the main dashboard analytics page, I should be redirected to the 90 day report page. <roam uid="PX06qckcQ"/>
                  - **Test:** When I open the 90 day report page, I should see “Cases without MD evaluation”, “Within 15 days”, “Within 45 days” cards, and the MR list. <roam uid="uEcI2cvYh"/>
                  - **Test:** When I view the list, it should display all active cases where “Is there case physician” is set to No during MR creation. <roam uid="kSnOppumt"/>
                  - **Test:** When I view the Total Cases card, it should display all open cases without MD evaluation. <roam uid="-MvoeOYkh"/>
                  - **Test:** Total Cases card count should match the list count. <roam uid="znalneJc9"/>
                  - **Test:** When I view “Within 15 days” card, it should show cases without MD evaluation falling under the last 15 days based on MD referral limits (90/120/150/180 days). <roam uid="KmG6SIHhG"/>
                  - **Test:** When I view “Within 45 days” card, it should show cases without MD evaluation falling under the last 45 days based on MD referral limits. <roam uid="PQ3_x3jVL"/>
                  - **Test:** When I change referral days from 90 to 120 in system settings, the counts in “Within 15 days” and “Within 45 days” cards should update accordingly. <roam uid="HMXFNS52V"/>
                  - **Test:** Cases within 15 days should display a red flag, and cases within 45 days should display a yellow flag in both cards and list. <roam uid="o5qVffK7X"/>
                  - **Test:** Cases moving from 45 days to 15 days should be removed from 45 days count and included in 15 days count. <roam uid="ON9nnf4FV"/>
                  - **Test:** When I click “Report Filters”, a side drawer should open with Facility and Provider filters along with “Reset Defaults” and “Apply Filters”. <roam uid="zZp0juFN8"/>
                  - **Test:** “Reset Defaults” and “Apply Filters” buttons should only appear after selecting any filter. <roam uid="8B8lNeTH8"/>
                  - **Test:** Facility dropdown should display all available facilities. <roam uid="f8DV_mAIe"/>
                  - **Test:** Provider dropdown should display all available providers. <roam uid="LsNYKDaFY"/>
                  - **Test:** When only Facility filter is applied, data should filter based on cases having at least one appointment in that facility. <roam uid="16KbYN2Cb"/>
                  - **Test:** When only Provider filter is applied, data should filter based on cases having at least one appointment with that provider. <roam uid="3nNkfkI_N"/>
                  - **Test:** When both Facility and Provider filters are applied, data should filter based on matching both conditions. <roam uid="5mNT2LIxx"/>
                  - **Test:** Clicking “Reset Defaults” should clear all filters and reset data. <roam uid="EPQWXLrh2"/>
                  - **Test:** After applying filters, “Cases without MD evaluation” card count should match list count. <roam uid="82nuX-j9N"/>
                  - **Test:** When no filters are applied, “Applied Filter(s)” should display N/A. <roam uid="68epsU_-6"/>
                  - **Test:** When filters are applied, they should be displayed beside “Applied Filter(s)”. <roam uid="c-2pucxT8"/>
                  - **Test:** Searching by Client ID or Client Name should filter the list accordingly. <roam uid="S2tzGOOAV"/>
                  - **Test:** Clearing the search should reset the list to default. <roam uid="CpZE5dxh3"/>
                  - **Test:** Sorting Client Name should work in ascending and descending order based on last name. <roam uid="nnESsDr1w"/>
                  - **Test:** Sorting Date of Onset should work in ascending and descending order. <roam uid="Ke9PdxrDR"/>
                  - **Test:** Sorting Provider Name should work alphabetically based on provider last name. <roam uid="1HSqqXW3q"/>
                  - **Test:** “Days to Referral” should display remaining days for each case and decrease daily. <roam uid="ddp4gG146"/>
                  - **Test:** When referral days are exceeded, “Overdue” should appear in red and the entire row should be highlighted with a warning icon. <roam uid="7Iu7D1rXY"/>
                  - **Test:** Sorting “Days to Referral” should work in ascending and descending order and include overdue cases. <roam uid="KHd1fXpou"/>
                  - **Test:** Clicking “View Details” should navigate to the selected client’s MR chart notes. <roam uid="mtxDldBJq"/>
                  - **Test:** When no data is available, cards should display 0. <roam uid="OBfkoAxBz"/>
                  - **Test:** When no list data is available, “No reports available.” message should be shown. <roam uid="8QCFptTqR"/>
                  - **Test:** When no results match search input, “No report found for the entered text.” message should be shown. <roam uid="sVzQl9bFg"/>
                  - **Test:** Hovering over flag icons should display tooltip showing days remaining to deadline. <roam uid="sKpVNCASP"/>
                  - **Test:** Clicking the exclamation icon should display tooltip as per design. <roam uid="hGdyy58T6"/>
              - Screen2: <roam uid="zyH1s1UEi" refs="1"/>
                1. UI:\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FJpa1bpe9CF.png?alt=media&token=06381730-b785-4f0c-8daf-7d6dc40cdc6f) <roam uid="tKeOk3zmU" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases <roam uid="Lq8HU_6Vf" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i click on question mark icon on “Cases without MD evaluation card” then a pop must be opened as per design with the given information.#Manual <roam uid="UOA-u18BP" refs="1"/>
              - Screen3: <roam uid="QTGxBaOVy" refs="1"/>
                1. UI:\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FA8zOXTziqm.png?alt=media&token=9d3c9042-3276-4788-a3ef-f9758179cb35) <roam uid="2RTN1rx7S" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases <roam uid="DZfsmCJHT" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i click on question mark icon on “Within 15 days” card then a pop must be opened as per design with the given information.#Manual <roam uid="Jqq_bH2bX" refs="1"/>
              - Screen:4 <roam uid="B_GLfT93T" refs="1"/>
                1. UI:\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FDaBp1no1lu.png?alt=media&token=f5031203-610d-4253-a546-bfa1212e2712) <roam uid="oK-JCRxF4" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases <roam uid="Cee100qMe" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i click on question mark icon on “Within 45 days” card then a pop must be opened as per design with the given information.#Manual <roam uid="MKsguoK-t" refs="1"/>
            - Client Status Report <roam uid="AaRWYRiPP" refs="1"/>
              - Screen1: <roam uid="8k-4oEOMe" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2Fs11pdZGXEU.png?alt=media&token=f4c7f011-71ba-427f-82d8-0c0f2d7c3db9) <roam uid="NRsI68Hi2" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases: <roam uid="7QIKdk4hp" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i click on client status report card on dashboard , i should get redirected to “**Client Status Report**” Page. <roam uid="0F_IbM5U5" refs="1"/>
                  2. When i see Total Clients card i should see the count of all the Active and InActive clients in the system with at least 1 appointment whose status is “**completed**”. <roam uid="6owRY_WCJ" refs="1"/>
              - Screen2: <roam uid="72CaEXfwY" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2Fi8b8jkWnDg.png?alt=media&token=5eaa2bc1-7c69-4248-915c-4aa02bdefd14) <roam uid="tY3sGvqbR" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases: <roam uid="CfzeoiBEL" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i see “New Clients (Last 30 days)” card , then i must see the count of all the New clients in the system with initial appointment date falls in last 30 day time period and appointment whose status is “**completed**” irrespective of whether client is active or inactive. <roam uid="wlOEyV4B7" refs="1"/>
                  2. When a client had their initial appointment more than 30 days ago, <roam uid="-1ZS_mMV9" refs="1"/>
                  3. Then that client should not be included in the “New Clients (Last 30 days)” card even if they had recent appointments. <roam uid="OadUXHh0c" refs="1"/>
                  4. When a client has an appointment within the last 30 days but the status is not “Completed” (e.g., Cancelled or No Show, scheduled , Engaged), <roam uid="RvXLkhtpi" refs="1"/>
                  5. Then that client should not be counted in the card. <roam uid="b1DnaNtpD" refs="1"/>
              - Screen 3: <roam uid="e3Y9KJtC2" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2Fl4Muvpj17F.png?alt=media&token=93918a1e-5a91-4a58-b5f2-5c82f311150b) <roam uid="YepTdL0L7" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases: <roam uid="R6bpClrQj" refs="1"/>
                  1. When I view the “Active Clients” card ,Then I should see the count of all clients whose status is Active in the system. <roam uid="LymM4-XL_" refs="1"/>
                  2. When a new client is added and their status is set to Active,Then the count in the “Active Clients” card should increase by 1. <roam uid="Aytn-IqMu" refs="1"/>
                  3. When an existing client marked as Inactive is changed to Active,Then the “Active Clients” count should reflect the change. <roam uid="_s1m-fu96" refs="1"/>
                  4. When a client is marked as InActive, they should not be counted in the “Active Clients” card. <roam uid="Edowxme3C" refs="1"/>
              - Screen:4 <roam uid="r0MC4lfpw" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FNG6wbulwoc.png?alt=media&token=30a49b57-2098-44ed-9c54-5dcb0316368b) <roam uid="FEnPZgniX" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases <roam uid="AwDGeUHEq" refs="1"/>
                  1. When I view the “Inactive Clients” card, I should see the count of all clients whose status is Inactive. <roam uid="4oMm6zepK" refs="1"/>
                  2. When a client is marked as Inactive, they should be included in the “Inactive Clients” count. <roam uid="zMpdJfjEh" refs="1"/>
                  3. When a new client is added and their status is set to Inactive, the count should increase by 1. <roam uid="mbY4i-3lV" refs="1"/>
                  4. When an Active client is changed to Inactive, the card should reflect the updated count. <roam uid="CvkmYVO8J" refs="1"/>
                  5. When a client is marked as Active, they should not be counted in the “Inactive Clients” card. <roam uid="6xzVqggUk" refs="1"/>
                  6. When there are no clients in the system, the card should show 0. <roam uid="kYEnJN8dz" refs="1"/>
                  7. When all clients are marked as Active, the “Inactive Clients” card should show 0. <roam uid="MuQ4r2c48" refs="1"/>
              - Screen 5: <roam uid="JQsgBJxEs" refs="1"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2FO6RjAuxW0Y.png?alt=media&token=72cbdf60-a8ac-4993-a335-8ff17f05a33b) <roam uid="_6Ow8EeCT" refs="1"/>
                2. Test cases <roam uid="_Pzdf99U_" refs="1"/>
                  1. When i see the list , the list must consists of all the clients present in the system , include both active and inactive clients by default, <roam uid="Rm97lBVsg" refs="1"/>
                  2. When i click on “Client Status” field then a drop down must be shown with , “Active , InActive , All” option. <roam uid="VoEZWUU6h" refs="1"/>
                  3. When I select “Active” from the dropdown, the list should show only active clients. <roam uid="1ySXUwYF6" refs="1"/>
                  4. When I select “InActive” from the dropdown, the list should show only inactive clients. <roam uid="rKLccJdZW" refs="1"/>
                  5. When I select “All” from the dropdown, the list should show both active and inactive clients. <roam uid="tKLVkhwYY" refs="1"/>
                  6. When I enter a valid client ID or valid client name in the search box, the list should be filtered to show matching client(s). <roam uid="A9bLc3sMc" refs="1"/>
                  7. When I enter a partial client ID or name, the list should show all clients whose IDs contain that value. <roam uid="ZXgu9g7KV" refs="1"/>
                  8. When I enter a value that does not match any client ID or name, the list should display “No report found for the entered text.' <roam uid="6gOlPzI7x" refs="1"/>
                  9. When I clear the search box, the full unfiltered list should be displayed again. <roam uid="SgmM-oShE" refs="1"/>

            - Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) - (Management Overview Cards) <roam uid="z3Oe8w-E8"/>
              - Screen 1: <roam uid="X7XBJQE-k"/>
                1. UI\n![](https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/firescript-577a2.appspot.com/o/imgs%2Fapp%2FProject_Kinergy%2F6oFvIHa_ql.png?alt=media&token=537a3a83-ecd1-4627-9b4a-0023e12a08ba) <roam uid="cIjFSxzP1"/>
                2. Test Cases <roam uid="BSFcJodNA"/>
                  1. When Management View Toggle is enabled, the **Vacancy Rate (%) card** must appear in the Provider Metrics tab. <roam uid="tzffqWxdO"/>
                  2. When Management View Toggle is disabled, the **Vacancy Rate (%) card** must not be visible. #Manual <roam uid="HkVtj9_6a"/>
                  3. When no filters are applied and default **YTD** date range is active: <roam uid="lGFtsBFDj"/>
                    - Scheduled Working Time = total provider schedule time available for all providers within the selected date range. <roam uid="OKFZm7pdZ"/>
                    - Total Booked Time = total appointment time (excluding *canceled* and *no-provider*) + *business blocked time* + *double-booked time (counted twice)*, all within scheduled time. <roam uid="PMX9PdmS8"/>
                    - Vacancy Time = Scheduled Working Time − Total Booked Time. <roam uid="9vnFH1R9a"/>
                    - Vacancy Rate (%) = (Vacant Time ÷ Scheduled Time) × 100. <roam uid="r6bKB5-KA"/>
                    - Example: <roam uid="3n7NgMdVn"/>
                      - Scheduled = 12,000 min <roam uid="EXSBpSqHL"/>
                      - Booked = 9,000 min <roam uid="WV6QgiqXs"/>
                      - Vacant = 3,000 min <roam uid="sjd8TE0kj"/>
                      - Vacancy Rate = (3,000 ÷ 12,000) × 100 = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="O9qDFAia4"/>
                  4. When Total Booked Time exceeds Scheduled Time (due to double bookings or data overlap), the Vacancy Rate must be **capped at 0% (no negative values)**. #Manual <roam uid="a_fP63ZXu"/>
                  5. When provider schedules are modified in the future, **historical data must remain unchanged** (Vacancy Rate must not recalculate retroactively). #Manual <roam uid="-JPl7AKiG"/>
                  6. When Facility filter is applied: <roam uid="L7tnWY4mZ"/>
                    - Scheduled Working Time = total time available for all providers at the **selected facility** in the chosen date range. <roam uid="Zbk8irn-C"/>
                    - Total Booked Time = total appointment + blocked time (excluding canceled and no-provider) within that facility. <roam uid="lvYw55pQx"/>
                    - Example: <roam uid="gOpEzN22F"/>
                      - Facility = “Facility A” <roam uid="Iwin11XFt"/>
                      - Scheduled = 6,000 min <roam uid="2SuC6cv_Y"/>
                      - Booked = 4,500 min <roam uid="UC-cJSi5w"/>
                      - Vacant = 1,500 min <roam uid="NKLWVFq0Y"/>
                      - Vacancy Rate = (1,500 ÷ 6,000) × 100 = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="ELDLh9XT3"/>
                  7. When Provider filter is applied: <roam uid="1xMXL7siq"/>
                    - Scheduled Working Time = total scheduled minutes for the selected provider. <roam uid="QTzbc-AQh"/>
                    - Total Booked Time = total appointment time for the selected provider (excluding canceled + no-provider) + double-booked + business block time. <roam uid="pA332Wqqx"/>
                    - Example: <roam uid="_nLRf_fIX"/>
                      - Provider = A <roam uid="ouPUXJDPe"/>
                      - Scheduled = 2,400 min <roam uid="Mif8gxXgI"/>
                      - Booked = 1,800 min <roam uid="a9kolBmmQ"/>
                      - Vacant = 600 min <roam uid="R4Pz_WL9P"/>
                      - Vacancy Rate = (600 ÷ 2,400) × 100 = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="xNeZwTaNi"/>
                  8. When provider schedule changes (e.g., extended hours), **past vacancy rates remain unchanged**. #Manual <roam uid="8IE-dSuHd"/>
                  9. When Service and Service Category filter are applied: <roam uid="S1wODResb"/>
                    - Scheduled Working Time = total scheduled minutes for providers linked to selected service or category. <roam uid="opcuV1XX1"/>
                    - Total Booked Time = total appointment time (excluding canceled + no-provider) + business blocked + double booked within selected service/category. <roam uid="cSpAv7zq9"/>
                    - Example: <roam uid="JwIjFjeo7"/>
                      - Service = “Physiotherapy” <roam uid="Qf1LGQ3AD"/>
                      - Scheduled = 5,400 min <roam uid="lp6I-Y4G1"/>
                      - Booked = 4,320 min <roam uid="MpT-sa4UC"/>
                      - Vacant = 1,080 min <roam uid="IMPwrIQ69"/>
                      - Vacancy Rate = (1,080 ÷ 5,400) × 100 = **20%**. #Manual <roam uid="bgaI5N0_d"/>
                  10. Verify that appointments from other services/categories are excluded. #Manual <roam uid="yF-CZsb3H"/>
                  11. When multiple filters are applied (e.g., Facility + Provider + Service): <roam uid="VVVS7Z6ey"/>
                    - The Vacancy Rate must consider **only the intersection** of all selected filters. <roam uid="O3rJYUpjL"/>
                    - Example: <roam uid="JK2AvUaFI"/>
                      - Facility = Facility A, Provider = Provider A, Service = “Massage Therapy”. <roam uid="SWfCGYA-L"/>
                      - Scheduled = 1,200 min <roam uid="pTw68Zxvh"/>
                      - Booked = 900 min <roam uid="tKfdkaJ6c"/>
                      - Vacant = 300 min <roam uid="d-2WvAgcQ"/>
                      - Vacancy Rate = (300 ÷ 1,200) × 100 = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="hYDUPVTK5"/>
                  12. **YTD (default)** – Vacancy Rate must calculate based on all provider schedules from Jan 1 to today. #Manual <roam uid="_D9H5z23i"/>
                  13. **Last Month** – Vacancy Rate must include only schedule and booked time between the 1st and last date of previous month. Example: 8,000 scheduled, 6,400 booked → (1,600 ÷ 8,000) × 100 = **20%**. #Manual <roam uid="PuLzy4Vq8"/>
                  14. **Today** – Vacancy Rate must reflect only the current day’s scheduled and booked time. Example: 480 scheduled, 360 booked → Vacancy Rate = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="bjDhtk28Y"/>
                  15. **Prior Year** – Vacancy Rate must consider full previous year’s scheduled and booked data without affecting current year metrics. Example: 90,000 scheduled, 60,000 booked → Vacancy Rate = **33.3%**. #Manual <roam uid="AL12jaUH-"/>

                  3. When applying Service/Category filter, the card must divide total completed appointments for that service by total unique clients for that service. Example: 3 ÷ 2 → CVA = 1.5 #Manual <roam uid="W7zomnGSM"/>

                  8. When selecting the **“Last Month”** time period, the CVA card must calculate based only on completed appointments in that month and divide by unique clients in the same month. Example: 8 ÷ 3 = 2.666 → CVA = 2.7 #Manual <roam uid="QF6s_w2_C"/>
                  9. When selecting the **“Year-to-Date (YTD)”** time period, the CVA card must calculate based only on completed appointments from January 1st to the current date and divide by unique clients in the same period. Example: 12 ÷ 5 = 2.4 → CVA = 2.4 #Manual <roam uid="rMFEpHnVj"/>
                  10. When selecting the **“Prior Year”** time period, the CVA card must calculate based only on completed appointments in the previous calendar year and divide by unique clients in that year. Example: 10 ÷ 4 = 2.5 → CVA = 2.5 #Manual <roam uid="I2GlffUhY"/>
                  11. When selecting **“Today”** as the date range, the CVA card must calculate based only on completed appointments for today and divide by unique clients with appointments today. Example: 3 ÷ 2 = 1.5 → CVA = 1.5 #Manual <roam uid="br6O5X4-2"/>
